claim: Ghent Chocolate Workshop offers a 2.5h pralines+mendiants class (€56) and 1.5h truffles class (€42) in English at Nodenaysteeg 5, 3 min from Korenmarkt.
quote: craft yourself 20+ chocolate truffles ... 1.5h workshop hosted in English ... Nodenaysteeg 5, 9000 Gent ... approximately 3 minutes walk from Korenmarkt

claim: Chocolade Ambassade runs a 1h45m chocolate-making workshop at Kraanlei 3 in a 16th-century townhouse where you grind cacao and make your own bar.
quote: Make your own chocolate from scratch ... 1h 45 min ... Kraanlei 3, 9000 Ghent, Belgium (in a historic 16th-century townhouse)

claim: The Onderbergen 4A workshop pairs praline-making from scratch with a tasting of authentic Belgian beer.
quote: Guided by an expert chocolatier, you'll create your own Belgian pralines from scratch and enjoy a tasting experience of authentic Belgian beer(s). The workshop takes place at Onderbergen 4A, Ghent.

claim: MIGLOT's private 2.5h perfume workshop is capped at 2 participants and includes a 50ml Eau de Parfum in a leather travel-spray case with refills; €545 in the workshop catalogue (€645 with extras).
quote: max 2 participants ... 2.5 hours ... MAISON MIGLOT Ghent Koophandelsplein 17, 9000 Ghent ... Your own fragrance creation in travel spray format with personalized leather case and two refills

claim: MIGLOT also runs a non-private group perfume workshop priced at €195 per person.
quote: The MIGLOT Perfume Workshop costs €195.00, and the private workshop costs €545

claim: MIGLOT bills itself as the first Belgian perfume house and is listed by Visit Gent as a fragrance lab in the city centre.
quote: MIGLOT Fragrance Lab | Visit Gent ... The First Belgian Perfume House

claim: Gruut city brewery offers a 50-minute three-beer guided tasting at €15/person, minimum two people, must be reserved in advance.
quote: €15/pers ... 50min ... possible for a minimum of two people, and must be reserved ... Rembert Dodoensdreef 1, 9000 Ghent

claim: Filliers Distillery in Deinze offers a 1.5–2 hour guided distillery tour with tasting; guides available in Dutch, French or English.
quote: calculate 1.5 to 2 hours for a tour, tasting included. Guides in Dutch, French or English can be provided ... visits take place daily by appointment, with the exception of Sundays & public holidays

claim: Dok Brewing Company runs an open Saturday 14:30 brewery tour, ages 16+, no Saturday-evening or Sunday tours.
quote: Small groups or individuals can join the 2:30pm open tour on Saturday ... Tours are for adults aged 16+ ... Tours are not offered on Saturday evening or Sunday

claim: Suzy hosts an authentic Belgian cooking class in her Ghent home — couples cook a Flemish meal (e.g. stoverij, witloof) with the host.
quote: Authentic Belgian cooking class in Ghent with Suzy ... a four-course Flemish meal ... stoverij (beef stewed in beer) or witloof (Belgian endives with cheese and ham)

claim: A Private Handmade Pasta Workshop and Tasting in Ghent gives couples one-on-one training from two pasta experts using traditional Sicilian recipes.
quote: hands-on training from two pasta experts in creating your own preferred pasta. All dishes are based on traditional Italian recipes or recipes originating from Elisa's family who still lives in Sicily

claim: Ghent's Industriemuseum, in a former cotton mill near Vrijdagmarkt, runs printers' demos, a make-your-own minizine activity, and live spinning/weaving sessions.
quote: Make your own minizine as you make your way through the exhibition ... Printing Department ... interactive elements like discovery boxes and working machinery

claim: ARTCADE in Brussels is a 60-minute immersive AR/360°-projection venue at Mont des Arts 5 with nine themed areas, suitable for all ages.
quote: augmented reality and 360° projections across 9 themed areas ... recommended duration of 60 minutes ... Mont des Arts 5, 1000 Brussels

claim: Floraliën Ghent 2026 runs 1–10 May 2026 across 10 days at Familie Van Rysselberghedreef 2 in Ghent's arts district.
quote: Friday 1 May to Sunday 10 May 2026 ... 10 days of floral and plant splendour ... Familie Van Rysselberghedreef 2 bus 3, 9000 Ghent

claim: Lockdown Ghent has 6 escape rooms with a 4.6 rating; Rum Rebellion uses a live actor.
quote: Lockdown Gent has 6 rooms and a rating of 4.6 ... The Rum Rebellion room features live interaction from a pirate captain

claim: Ghent has 10 escape-game venues offering 35 rooms total — wide selection for couples; top-rated venues include Exit Games (4.8) and The Box (90 min, 7 rooms).
quote: in Ghent you can go to 10 locations to play an escape game with 35 escape rooms to choose from ... Exit Games Ghent offers 6 rooms with a 4.8 rating ... The Box ... 7 rooms and 90 minutes to escape

claim: Ambacht in Beeld Festival runs 9–10 May 2026 at Tour & Taxis Gare Maritime, Brussels — includes one-on-one glassblowing masterclasses (vase, carafe, glass).
quote: May 9 & 10, 2026 in Brussels at Tour & Taxis Gare Maritime ... a one-on-one masterclass you will learn to create a glass object yourself ... craft vase, carafe, drinking glass or own creation

claim: Bokrijk open-air museum in Genk runs six €5 hands-on workshops — clay pot, bread roll, leather bracelet, screen-printed bag, etc.
quote: 6 workshops where you can work as a 'craftsman' yourself and learn to make your own pot from clay, bake rolls, make a leather bracelet, print a gym bag or shopping bag according to your own design, with each workshop costing €5

claim: Belgian Chocolate Workshop runs the same praline (2.5h, €56) and truffle (1.5h, €42) classes from three Flemish locations: Brussels, Bruges and Ghent.
quote: Brussels: Rue des Foulons 30 ... Bruges: Grauwwerkersstraat 15 ... Ghent: Nodenaysteeg 5 ... 2.5-Hour Praline & Mendiants Workshop ... €56 adults

claim: Bruges Beer Experience is a museum+tasting (15cl × 3 beers included) covering Trappist beers, beer history and brewing.
quote: the history of beer, beer in Bruges, Trappist beers, beer types and brewing processes ... admission including a tasting of 15cl of three beers of your choice

claim: The Bruges Waffles 'n Beer Workshop combines a Belgian-waffle baking class with tasting of three Belgian beers — pitched at couples.
quote: great for families, adults, and couples ... history and brewing process behind 3 interesting Belgian beers ... Belgian waffle baking class

claim: Tomorrowland Belgium 2026 runs over two weekends in Boom: 17–19 July and 24–26 July 2026.
quote: two weekends at its spiritual home of Boom, from 17th to 19th and 24th to 26th July

claim: Floraliën-week ticket-holders can visit Ghent's GUM Botanical Garden for €6 in May 2026.
quote: visit the Botanical Garden (GUM) in May 2026 for €6 on presentation of your Floraliën ticket

claim: GlazenHuis (Lommel) — Flanders' centre for contemporary glass art and glassblowing workshops — is closed for renovations until spring 2027.
quote: GlazenHuis is closed for renovations until the spring of 2027

claim: Bloemen Robberechts (near Ghent) runs scheduled flower-arranging workshops on 11 Mar, 1 Apr, 10 Jun 2026 — 2 hours, group max 12, materials included for €30.
quote: Wednesday, March 11, 2026 ... Wednesday, April 1, 2026 ... Wednesday, June 10, 2026 ... All materials for one complete flower arrangement or bouquet (worth €30) and refreshments are included, with a maximum group size of 12
